ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the monitoring site */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the monitoring site is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the monitoring site is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the monitoring site is located */,
  "cbsa" TEXT /* Core Based Statistical Area (CBSA) where the monitoring site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of monitoring site (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the monitoring site */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the monitoring site was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the monitoring site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_code" INTEGER /* Code for the parameter */,
  "units_of_measure" TEXT /* Units of measure for the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutant_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant standard */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Parameter used to evaluate the pollutant standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant standard */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the pollutant standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample duration */,
  "duration_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample duration */,
  "duration_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_code" INTEGER /* Code for the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who accessed the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data point that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data point that triggered the alert */,
  "aqi_threshold" REAL /* AQI threshold that was exceeded */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message sent with the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data point that the weather data is associated with */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millibars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Monitoring site that the GIS data is associated with */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring site (e.g., city, state) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the monitoring site is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system being integrated with */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., weather, GIS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data point that the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who has the permission */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Data point that the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
